arms.description: Each question is paired with its leakage-safe source GI image.
Every question is paired with the same neutral RGB image; this is the trained question-prior control.

data.record_order: condition-identical source-selection order followed by per-source record-selection order

evaluation_after_training.first_gate: Run each final adapter on the locked 20-item development smoke with paired images.

purpose: Test whether otherwise identical adaptation depends on paired visual evidence rather than only question and answer priors before scaling Study 1 training.
success_criteria: Both arms use exactly the same ordered item IDs, questions, answers, optimiser settings and random seeds.
The paired arm uses only its correct grouped-training source image; the constant arm uses one identical neutral image for every record.
Neither training arm nor preparation code reads development or test records.
Each arm saves a complete checkpoint at step 128 and explicitly resumes it to step 256.
Each resumed adapter differs from its step-128 adapter and independently reloads with finite loss.
The final adapter bytes, prepared-dataset manifests, logs and run report are content-hashed.
